html:query.declare: <!--<DATOS oi_empresa="1" cb_confidenciales="T" e_periodo="202404" oi_liquidacion="" oi_reporte="2"/>--> <DATOS oi_empresa="2" cb_confidenciales="T" e_periodo="202511" oi_liquidacion="" oi_reporte="3"/>

GROUP.noreg: No se encontraron registros para los filtros seleccionados.

qry:select.name: qry_report
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ26_REPORTES.o_label, LIQ26_REPORTES.c_agrupacion, LIQ26_REPORTES.l_mostrar, LIQ26_REPORTES.l_separar, LIQ26_REPORTES.l_agregartotales, LIQ26_REPORTES.OI_REPORTE FROM LIQ26_REPORTES WHERE LIQ26_REPORTES.OI_REPORTE = {#SOURCE:@oi_reporte} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_col_conc
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT liq26_columnas.d_columna, liq26_columnas.oi_columna, liq26_columnas.c_signo, liq26_columnas.o_style, liq26_columnas.c_tipo, liq26_columnas.e_posicion, liq26_columnas.c_sumar FROM liq26_columnas WHERE liq26_columnas.OI_REPORTE = {#SOURCE:@oi_reporte} order by e_posicion ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_concs
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ26_COL_CON.oi_concepto FROM LIQ26_COL_CON WHERE LIQ26_COL_CON.oi_columna = {#SOURCE:@oi_columna} ')/ROWS

qry:select.name: qry_col_fija
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select c.oi_reporte, c.c_columna, c.d_columna, c.c_tipo, c.o_style, c.e_posicion from LIQ26_COLFIJAS as c WHERE c.OI_REPORTE = {#SOURCE:@oi_reporte} order by e_posicion ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_cabecera
qry_personas
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('SELECT L97.e_numero_legajo, Max(L97.c_nro_cuil) as c_nro_cuil, max(L97.d_ape_y_nom) as d_ape_y_nom, max(L97.c_sexo) as c_sexo, sum(L20.n_totsret) as suma, sum(L20.n_totnsret) as suma1, sum(L20.n_totpag) as suma2, sum(L20.n_totdesc) as suma3, sum(L20.n_totcont) as suma4, sum(L20.n_totasig) as suma5, max(O18.c_convenio) as c_convenio, max(C18.c_categoria) as c_categoria, max(O18.d_convenio) as d_convenio, max(C18.d_categoria) as d_categoria, max(L97.c_centro_costo_ult) as c_centro_costo_ult, max(O08.d_centro_costo) as d_centro_costo, max(L97.c_afjp) as c_afjp, max(P03.d_afjp) as d_afjp, max(L97.c_sindicato) as c_sindicato, max(P30.d_sindicato) as d_sindicato, max(L97.c_obra_social) as c_obra_social, max(P06.d_obra_social) as d_obra_social, max(L97.f_nacim) as f_nacim, max(L97.f_ingreso) as f_ingreso, max(L97.f_antiguedad_rec) as f_antiguedad_rec, max(L97.c_ubicacion) as c_ubicacion, max(L97.d_banco) as d_banco, max(L97.d_sucursal) as d_sucursal, max(UBI.d_ubicacion) as d_ubicacion, max(FUN.c_funcion) as c_funcion, max(FUN.d_funcion) as d_funcion, L97.{%= $ESTR/ESTR/@gru %} AS gru FROM LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as L97, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER AS L20, ORG08_CS_COSTO AS O08, PER03_AFJP AS P03, PER30_SINDICATOS AS P30, PER06_OBRAS_SOC AS P06, org18_categorias AS C18, org18_convenios AS O18, LIQ99_RECIBOS AS R99, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as L99, LIQ93_EMPRESAS as L93, ORG03_EMPRESAS as O03, ( select X.c_ubicacion, X.d_ubicacion from ORG03_UBICACIONES as X where X.oi_empresa={%=$SOURCE/@oi_empresa %} ) AS UBI, ( select Y.c_funcion, Y.d_funcion from ORG03_FUNCIONES as Y where Y.oi_empresa={%=$SOURCE/@oi_empresa %} )AS FUN
JOIN C18.c_categoria INNER L97.c_categoria_ult, O18.c_convenio INNER L97.c_convenio, C18.oi_convenio INNER O18.oi_convenio, L97.c_centro_costo_ult INNER O08.c_centro_costo, L97.c_afjp INNER P03.c_afjp, L97.c_sindicato INNER P30.c_sindicato, L97.c_obra_social INNER P06.c_obra_social, L20.oi_tot_liq_per INNER R99.oi_tot_liq_per, L20.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER L97.oi_per_emp_ddo, L93.oi_empresa_ddo INNER L99.oi_empresa_ddo, L93.c_empresa INNER O03.c_empresa, L97.c_ubicacion LEFT OUTER UBI.c_ubicacion, L97.c_funcion LEFT OUTER FUN.c_funcion, L99.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER R99.oi_liquidacion_ddo where O03.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} AND L99.e_periodo = {#SOURCE:@e_periodo} {%? (#PARAMIN:@cb_confidenciales != '' and #PARAMIN:@cb_confidenciales!='T' ) {% {%? (#PARAMIN:@cb_confidenciales = 'C') {% AND L20.l_confidencial = 1%}{% AND L20.l_confidencial = 0 %} %} %} {% %} %} group by L97.e_numero_legajo, L97.{%= $ESTR/ESTR/@gru %} ORDER BY e_numero_legajo ASC')/ROWS/ROW, $x in $TEMP/GROUP join $r/@gru inner $x/@gru

qry:select.name: doc_liquidaciones
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT l99.oi_liquidacion_ddo FROM LIQ93_EMPRESAS as l93, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as l99, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as l19, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES as e19, org03_empresas as o03, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\') as SEC JOIN l93.oi_empresa_ddo INNER l99.oi_empresa_ddo, e19.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER l99.oi_liquidacion_ddo, l19.oi_liquidacion INNER e19.oi_liquidacion, l93.c_empresa INNER o03.c_empresa, l19.oi_liquidacion LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE o03.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} {%? (#PARAMIN:@cb_confidenciales != '' and #PARAMIN:@cb_confidenciales!='T' ) {% {%? (#PARAMIN:@cb_confidenciales = 'C') {% AND l19.l_confidencial = 1%}{% AND l19.l_confidencial = 0 %} %} %} {% %} %} and l99.e_periodo = {#SOURCE:@e_periodo} {%? ($ESTR/ESTR/@oi_liquidacion!='') {% and l19.oi_liquidacion = {$ESTR/ESTR/@oi_liquidacion} %} {% %} %} and l99.c_estado = \'F\' {%? (#SOURCE:@l_simulacion!='') {% AND l19.l_simulacion = {%= #SOURCE:@l_simulacion %} %} {% %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_datos
